rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by adding missing annex blocks or fixing syntax errors without changing unrelated architecture
Use only visible identifiers in guarantees and assumptions; do not reference implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
generic_rules: Place AGREE annexes in the correct scope: component type annexes for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations; implementation annexes for implementation-level bindings
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations and nested if-then-else for branching logic
Write guarantees that relate visible outputs to visible inputs in component type annexes
Use AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) in guarantees and assumptions
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use AGREE scalar types: int, real, and bool
For output dependency contracts, write guarantees that relate visible outputs to visible inputs
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not reference unresolved identifiers in guarantees or assumptions
Do not use invalid AGREE type names in const or eq declarations
